CONFIDENTIAL — Project Halberd

To: Legal + Incident Response
From: SecOps Lead
Date: 24 May 2026

Re: Materiality determination, Item 1.05 timeline

Status as of 06:00 UTC:

- Ransomware affecting the production billing cluster confirmed.
- Data exfiltration confirmed; approximately 4.2 TB of customer records observed leaving
  the perimeter.
- Lateral movement observed across the DMZ subnet between 02:14 and 04:08.
- Command-and-control beacon traced to two external IPs.
- Extortion demand received via the legal inbox at 05:50.

Counsel is preparing a materiality determination memo. The 4-business-day timer starts at
materiality determination; we are drafting the 8-K Item 1.05 filing in parallel. MAS Notice
644 1-hour notification has already been filed; NYDFS 72-hour clock is running.
